title: Ultimate BBQ Rub Seasoning, Chicken, Pork & Fish, One Pouch Makes 10 Family Meals, Premium Hand Blended, No Preservatives or Additves
features: Ultimate Versatility: One pouch creates 10 family meals, seasoning chicken, pork, and fish, with rich BBQ flavor. Perfect for BBQ rubs, BBQ chicken rub, BBQ pork rub, and BBQ fish rub.
Premium Hand-Blended Taste: Experience superior flavour with our hand-blended BBQ rub seasoning. No preservatives or additives, just pure, delicious barbecue rubs.
Perfect BBQ Chicken Every Time: Achieve mouthwatering results with our BBQ chicken seasoning and BBQ chicken rub. Ideal for BBQ chicken wings and creating memorable barbecue chicken meals.
Elevate Your Pork & fish: Transform pork and fish with our expertly crafted BBQ pork rub and BBQ fish rub. Add depth and complexity to your barbecue with our versatile barbecue rubs.
Maximize Flavour, Minimize Waste: Get exceptional value with a single pouch of our BBQ rub seasoning, designed to season 10 family meals. Enjoy restaurant-quality barbecue at home.
description: Product Description Three things we're passionate about and we think you should be too Too hot & Salty All too frequently we found spice blends available commercially to us and on the high street were out of balance, with poor quality spices that were also often too hot and or too salty. No to additives You’ll never find any additives, anti-caking agents, sulphates, or any thing that does not need to be there. We call them fillers that just pack out the weight. Have you ever seen a chef using them. All you need is flavour All our blends are made from top quality spices & herbs that we source from UK importers that are bursting with flavour, you don’t need much to make a great family meal. Hand Blended Spices We've been blending spices for over 20 years both personally and professionally, because we care what goes into our food. Food is our passion and we want to share it with you. Authentic Made Simple A word on chillies & heat Some of us love chilli but many do not. Many dishes are not supposed to leave your mouth numb, spices are not about how hot it can be, there about complex flavours that tantalise your taste buds and give you a taste explosion without making your eyes water. We dial the heat back so the whole family can eat a meal together. If you like more heat, then adding extra chilli is easy, but you can’t take it away. Are you a beginner or seasoned pro? Our spices are for everyone, no matter what your cooking skill For beginners, who want to try cooking more complex meals. You’ll gain confidence trying our recipes and then we hope you’ll adapt them, tweak them and come up with your own family favourites. For seasoned cooks, one of the reasons we started making batches in the first place was so we could cook quick meals at home in the week. With a ready-made blend you can cook a fresh family meal in around 30 to 40 minutes. Some blends have 14 spices and it takes time to make and balance them Downloadable recipe cards and full videos for every blend, to get you started. You typically need 2 teaspoons to make a meal for 5, so our 50g will make 5 meals for a family of 5 (25 portions) We make batches every week and to keep them fresh we seal them in resealable pouches We want you to enjoy cooking with spices from around the world. Our blends help you get the basic balance right. They’re the core building blocks, to get you exploring new and exciting meals. All our spice blends are suitable for vegan, & vegetarian. As simple as 1, 2, 3. Our easy steps to getting you cooking quicker, fresher and hopefully healthier meals Fast Prep We've done the hard bit, we've freshly blended up to 14 different spices, balancing them to perfection, you just need to chop the ingredients Pan Fry Or Oven Grill Grab your favourite cut of meat, follow the recipe card and chop it all up. If meats not your thing, all our spices are vegan & vegetarian friendly and you know what to do. Easy! Serve & Amaze The Family Enjoy a beautiful home cooked tasty meal with the family any day of the week. And because we made these for our own families there not too hot for little ones. Become a BBQ Legend. You will amaze your friends and family All our spices are what we call soft spices, which means you can cook them down quickly. Ideal for BBQ's and it's so easy. Just mix few teaspoons of any of our blends with a little cooking oil or water and marinate your favourite meat, poultry, fish or vegetables
